metadata.title: Ride Sharing Marketplace Data Assets
metadata.description: Starter catalog of key business, PII, and security-sensitive data assets for the Ride Sharing Marketplace domain.

assets.name: Customer Profile
assets.description: Core customer account, profile, and preference data used across domain journeys.
assets.accessScope: customer-facing journeys and approved internal operations
assets.businessMeaning: Core customer account, profile, and preference data used across domain journeys.

assets.name: Customer Contact Point
assets.description: Verified email, phone, and contactability state used for messaging and recovery.
assets.businessMeaning: Verified email, phone, and contactability state used for messaging and recovery.

interfaces.name: customer-contact-point api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Customer Contact Point.

assets.name: Consent Record
assets.description: Privacy, tracking, and communication consent history with auditable decisions.
assets.businessMeaning: Privacy, tracking, and communication consent history with auditable decisions.

assets.name: Identity Credential
assets.description: Credential metadata, password hashes, or authentication factor references.
assets.businessMeaning: Credential metadata, password hashes, or authentication factor references.

assets.name: Session Token
assets.description: Short-lived authenticated session state, refresh metadata, and revocation information.
assets.businessMeaning: Short-lived authenticated session state, refresh metadata, and revocation information.

assets.name: Access Policy
assets.description: Authorization rules, entitlements, restrictions, and access guardrails.
assets.businessMeaning: Authorization rules, entitlements, restrictions, and access guardrails.

assets.name: Audit Log
assets.description: Security and compliance event trail for sensitive operations and lifecycle changes.
assets.businessMeaning: Security and compliance event trail for sensitive operations and lifecycle changes.

assets.name: Payment Instrument Reference
assets.description: Tokenized payment method references or vaulted instrument links used in protected commerce flows.
assets.businessMeaning: Tokenized payment method references or vaulted instrument links used in protected commerce flows.

interfaces.name: payment-instrument-reference api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Payment Instrument Reference.

governance.sharingPolicy: approved payment and finance usage only

assets.name: Transaction
assets.description: Commercial or financial transaction state tracked across purchase, settlement, or payout workflows.
assets.businessMeaning: Commercial or financial transaction state tracked across purchase, settlement, or payout workflows.

governance.sharingPolicy: approved payment and finance usage only

assets.name: Trip Request And Intent Capture
assets.description: Captures rider pickup, destination, timing, ride type, account context, and trip intent before dispatch begins.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Trip Request and Intent Capture.

interfaces.name: trip-request-and-intent-capture api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Trip Request And Intent Capture.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Eta Maps And Routing Intelligence
assets.description: Provides route estimation, pickup guidance, airport geofencing, and live map context for riders and drivers.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on ETA, Maps and Routing Intelligence.

interfaces.name: eta-maps-and-routing-intelligence api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Eta Maps And Routing Intelligence.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Rider Identity Wallet And Payments
assets.description: Manages rider identity, family or business profiles, payment methods, receipts, refunds, and billing context.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Rider Identity, Wallet and Payments.

interfaces.name: rider-identity-wallet-and-payments api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Rider Identity Wallet And Payments.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Business And Fleet Controls
assets.description: Manages business travel policies, fleet accounts, supplier setup, reporting access, and account-level operational controls.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Business and Fleet Controls.

interfaces.name: business-and-fleet-controls api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Business And Fleet Controls.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Dispatch And Matching
assets.description: Matches rider demand to the best available driver or fleet supply while honoring geography, product rules, and trip quality constraints.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Dispatch and Matching.

interfaces.name: dispatch-and-matching api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Dispatch And Matching.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Dynamic Pricing And Incentives
assets.description: Calculates upfront fares, surge multipliers, discounts, and driver incentives based on demand, supply, market rules, and product type.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Dynamic Pricing and Incentives.

interfaces.name: dynamic-pricing-and-incentives api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Dynamic Pricing And Incentives.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Safety And Trust Operations
assets.description: Provides identity assurance, trip safety tooling, trust controls, incident workflows, and abuse or fraud prevention.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Safety and Trust Operations.

interfaces.name: safety-and-trust-operations api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Safety And Trust Operations.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Driver Onboarding And Compliance
assets.description: Supports driver signup, screening, document verification, and eligibility management across markets.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Driver Onboarding and Compliance.

interfaces.name: driver-onboarding-and-compliance api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Driver Onboarding And Compliance.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only
